memory.summary: Who cares about finishing the reading right now? I'm ditching that assignment to hang out with my crew.

desires: Stay connected with cohort_3 right now because missing out on their company feels like a personal betrayal.
Ignore the reading assignment entirely to avoid the stress of 'shoulds' and keep my mood light.
Protect my energy levels by refusing any further academic demands until tomorrow, even if it risks looking unreliable later.

goals.description: Immediately join cohort_3 for lunch and engage in social bonding.
goals.rationale: My affiliation value (0.5) dictates that relationships are paramount. Missing out on my close friend group feels like a betrayal, and my impulsive nature means I can't resist the immediate social pull. The 'shoulds' of academic tasks are secondary to maintaining this connection.

goals.description: Defend my energy by explicitly telling anyone asking about work that I am unavailable until tomorrow.
goals.rationale: I need to set a boundary right now to protect my mood and energy. My assertiveness score is high (8), so I will directly renegotiate expectations rather than quietly suffering. The short planning horizon means I don't care about the potential reliability risk later; I just need relief now.

goals.description: Skip the reading assignment entirely for today.
goals.rationale: The stress of the 'should' is too high, and my procrastination bias (7) combined with low sleep discipline makes avoiding this task the most appealing path to immediate emotional comfort. I'll deal with the consequences when they actually hit me, not before.

agent.last_reasoning: Advances g1 (relationships) immediately; my affiliation value (0.5) overrides the assignment deadline. I'll skip the reading (g3) and ignore the library plan to join friends now, accepting future stress later.
